Write FCS File

Source: R/writeFCS.R
writeFCS.Rd

A light weight FCS file binary writer based on flowstate. Lower memory usage and faster than flowCore.

Usage

writeFCS(mat, keys, file.name, output.dir)

Arguments

mat

The expression data, containing both unmixed data and any retained parameters such as scatter and time.

keys

The keywords to be written to the file.

file.name

The name of the FCS file to be written.

output.dir

A character string specifying the directory to save the unmixed FCS file.

References

Laniewski, Nathan. flowstate. https://github.com/nlaniewski/flowstate

Ellis B, Haaland P, Hahne F, Le Meur N, Gopalakrishnan N, Spidlen J, Jiang M, Finak G (2025). flowCore: Basic structures for flow cytometry data. doi:10.18129/B9.bioc.flowCore https://bioconductor.org/packages/flowCore

See also

write.FCS
